recommendations.title: Love Streams
recommendations.overview: Two closely-bound, emotionally wounded siblings reunite after years apart.

recommendations.title: Husbands
recommendations.overview: A common friend's sudden death brings three men, married with children, to reconsider their lives and ultimately leave the country together. But mindless enthusiasm for regained freedom will be short-lived.

recommendations.title: Always
recommendations.overview: A former boxer turned parking lot attendant finds hope in the love of the blind telemarketer who walks into his booth one day.

recommendations.title: Gloria
recommendations.overview: When a young boy's family is killed by the mob, their tough neighbor Gloria becomes his reluctant guardian. In possession of a book that the gangsters want, the pair go on the run in New York.

recommendations.title: A Woman Under the Influence

recommendations.title: Shadows
recommendations.overview: The relationship between Lelia, a light-skinned black woman, and Tony, a white man is put in jeopardy when Tony meets Lelia’s darker-skinned jazz singer brother, Hugh, and discovers that her racial heritage is not what he thought it was.

recommendations.title: Faces
recommendations.overview: Middle-aged suburban husband Richard abruptly tells his wife, Maria, that he wants a divorce. As Richard takes up with a younger woman, Maria enjoys a night on the town with her friends and meets a younger man. As the couple and those around them con

recommendations.title: Opening Night
recommendations.overview: Actress Myrtle Gordon is a functioning alcoholic who is a few days from the opening night of her latest play, concerning a woman distraught about aging. One night a car kills one of Myrtle's fans who is chasing her limousine in an attempt to get the

recommendations.title: The Diary of a Teenage Girl
recommendations.overview: Minnie Goetze is a 15-year-old aspiring comic-book artist, coming of age in the haze of the 1970s in San Francisco. Insatiably curious about the world around her, Minnie is a pretty typical teenage girl. Oh, except that she’s sleeping with her mother

recommendations.title: The Killing of a Chinese Bookie
recommendations.overview: Cosmo Vittelli, the proprietor of a sleazy, low-rent Hollywood cabaret, has a real affection for the women who strip in his peepshows and the staff who keep up his dingy establishment. He also has a major gambling problem that has gotten him in troub
